Hello,

This is the main body of a realistic email. It contains several paragraphs
of meaningful text that should be preserved after processing.

Here are some useful resources:
Check out https://example.com/docs/api for API documentation.
Visit https://github.com/user/repo/tree/main/src for the source code.

> This is some inline quoted text that should be elided.
> Another line of inline quotes.

Regards,
Jane Doe
--
-----Original Message-----
From: sender@example.com
Sent: Monday, March 7, 2026 10:00 AM
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Previous conversation

This is the original message that should be elided.
